name: form
description: A complete form block with validation, labels, and error handling.

props.name: initialValues
props.description: Initial values for all form fields. Keys should match the field names used in Form.Field.

props.name: validations
props.description: Array of field validation rules. Each entry has a field name and a validate function returning an error string or undefined.

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Called with the typed form values object when the form passes validation and is submitted.

props.name: onError
props.description: Called with the validation error map when form submission fails validation.

props.name: children
props.description: Form content. Can be static ReactNode or a render function that receives handleSubmit to trigger form submission.

examples.label: Example 1
Example 2
Example 3
examples.code:
<Form.Field name="email">
  {({ value, error, onChange, onBlur }) => (
    <TextInput value={value as string} onChangeText={onChange} onBlur={onBlur} />
  )}
</Form.Field>
